sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 90:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 90:1
items.html: The ascent of the bottom Hey to the Einayim, meaning the connection of the two Heys together is the primary cause for the emergence of Partzuf MA and BON. (Inner Observation, Item 6)
